projectDescription: Network security testing tool for validating IDS/IPS detection capabilities
keyFeatures: Test IDS/IPS with known malicious IPs from Cisco Talos and EmergingThreats
Validate detection of phishing URLs from OpenPhish feeds
Simulate malware distribution URL access from URLhaus
Simulate remote desktop management tool traffic (TeamViewer, AnyDesk, etc.)
Test with known bad user agents
publicApiSurface: known_IP() - Test connections to known malicious IPs
known_phish() - Test connections to phishing URLs
known_TOR() - Test TOR exit node connections
known_dist() - Test malware distribution URL access
generate_DGA() - Generate and test DGA domains
test_RAT() - Test remote desktop management tools
known_badAgents() - Test with known bad user agents
